nodes.name: Causal Feature Primitives
nodes.description: Statistical and information-theoretic feature extractors for pairwise causal direction detection

nodes.name: IGCI Asymmetry Score
nodes.description: Information-Geometric Causal Inference via log-ratio of consecutive deltas
nodes.type_signature: (x: NDArray, tx: str, y: NDArray, ty: str) -> float

nodes.name: HSIC Independence Test
nodes.description: Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion with RBF kernels and median bandwidth
nodes.type_signature: (X: NDArray, Y: NDArray, sig: list[float], maxpnt: int) -> float

nodes.name: KNN Entropy Estimator
nodes.description: Kozachenko-Leonenko differential entropy estimator with digamma corrections
nodes.type_signature: (x: NDArray, tx: str, m: int) -> float

nodes.name: Uniform Divergence
nodes.description: KL-divergence-like measure from empirical distribution to uniform using KNN density
nodes.type_signature: (x: NDArray, tx: str, m: int) -> float

nodes.name: Normalized Error Probability
nodes.description: Bayesian MAP error rate normalized by maximum possible error for causal asymmetry
nodes.type_signature: (x: NDArray, tx: str, y: NDArray, ty: str, ffactor: int, maxdev: int) -> float

nodes.name: Discretize and Bin
nodes.description: Two-pass robust normalization then integer binning for continuous variables
nodes.type_signature: (x: NDArray, tx: str, ffactor: int, maxdev: int, norm: bool) -> NDArray

nodes.name: Polyfit Nonlinearity Asymmetry
nodes.description: Quantifies how much the X->Y relationship deviates from linearity vs Y->X
nodes.type_signature: (x: NDArray, tx: str, y: NDArray, ty: str) -> float

nodes.name: Polyfit Residual Error
nodes.description: Polynomial regression residual std with type-aware categorical encoding
nodes.type_signature: (x: NDArray, tx: str, y: NDArray, ty: str, m: int) -> float
